testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Trusted by homeowners and businesses across Arizona

1.text: Oscar Salazar remodeled our bathroom and the attention to detail was amazing. He treated our home like it was his own. Fair pricing and honest work.

2.text: We needed drywall repair and new tile flooring after some water damage. Oscar showed up on time and the work looks better than before. Highly recommend.

3.text: Oscar fixed our stucco, repaired the fence, and repainted the whole exterior. A real neighbor who cares about doing the job right at a reasonable price.

serviceAreas.description: We proudly serve Wickenburg and the surrounding area. For projects beyond 50 miles, give us a call to arrange travel costs. No job is too big or too small.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Your trusted partner for home repairs and maintenance in Wickenburg

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: With over 20 years of experience, Oscar Salazar and his family have been well known in the Wickenburg community as neighbors and friends. Today, they proudly continue serving the community through Gato Montes Construction, providing reliable handyman and home maintenance services, including bathroom updates and repairs, flooring and tile repair, door and window installation, stucco and fence repair, drywall, painting, and many other home improvement services.
story.paragraph2: We understand the challenges of maintaining a property in the Arizona desert and offer lasting solutions at fair prices. As your local handyman team, we proudly serve Wickenburg and the surrounding area, and are happy to travel beyond 50 miles by prior arrangement.
